activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: LC exception active; consignor verification is not applicable.

consignee.motivation: LC exception active; consignee verification is not applicable.

goods_description.motivation: LC exception active; goods description verification is not applicable.

origin.certificate_value: CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR
origin.invoice_value: CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR
origin.motivation: LC exception active: verifying origin only per LC rules. The certificate origin list 'CZ, VN, IE, PL, CN, MY, EE, MK, CR' explicitly appears in invoice item origins. However, origin details in the invoice contain an unexplained asterisk suffix on some lines (e.g., '* CR, CN' on page 2), which requires manual review to confirm if suffix denotes preferential origin or other qualification. Therefore origin verification result is MANUAL_REVIEW.

manual_review_triggers: 2.2 LC exception rules require origin only verification with explicit origin fields.
4.5.1 Origin contains unexplained suffixes in invoice requiring manual verification.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: LC exception activated, verifying only origin. Origin countries in certificate match explicit invoice origins but invoice origins contain qualification suffixes requiring manual review. Other control points set to NOT_APPLICABLE under LC exception.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certificate refers to a Letter of Credit; only origin verification applies. The origins listed in the certificate and invoice match, but some origin markers in the invoice have uncertain suffixes that need manual checking.
